chat_layout_approval_notification_descri: {{count}} pending approval request(s). Agent is waiting for your authorization.
music_card_loading_wait: Please wait, AI is composing music...
video_card_loading_wait_message: Video generation usually takes 1–5 minutes. Please wait.
video_card_player_unsupported: Your browser does not support HTML5 video.
login_sso_error: {{provider}} SSO login failed, please try again
login_sso_not_configured: No SSO provider configured. Please contact your administrator.
sso_callback_provider_denied: Provider denied access: {{error}}. Returning to login in 3 seconds.
sso_callback_missing_params: Missing callback parameters. Please initiate SSO login again.
sso_callback_invalid_state: Invalid state parameter. Please initiate SSO login again.
login_copyright: © Chuck@2026 AIOS. Enterprise AI Execution Platform
chat_empty_state_subtitle: Send a message to start. The Agent will use tools to complete your task.
chat_agent_approval_failed: Approval failed, please go to the Approvals center
chat_task_timeout_message: This reply took longer than 5 minutes. Waiting has stopped, and the current page content has been kept.
chat_task_failed_message: Task failed. The current page content has been kept.
chat_task_cancelled_message: Task cancelled. The current page content has been kept.
chat_task_stream_error_message: The live connection was interrupted. The current page content has been kept. Please retry or send the message again.
chat_regenerate_prefix: Please regenerate an image using the following description (generate a different result):
chat_voice_not_supported: Speech recognition not supported in this browser
chat_compose_placeholder: Type a message... (Enter for newline, Cmd+Enter to send, / for commands, paste screenshots directly)
chat_video_unsupported: Your browser does not support HTML5 video.
chat_messages_idle_messages: Understanding your request…|Planning the approach…|Preparing tools…|Working on it…|Almost there, hang tight…
chat_messages_empty_state_subtitle: Send a message to start. The Agent will use tools to complete your task.
chat_toolbar_file_type_message: . Please upload Word, PDF, Markdown, Excel, PPT, CSV/TSV, or image files.
chat_toolbar_voice_warning: Speech recognition not supported in this browser
chat_toolbar_agent_selector_tooltip: Select expert Agent (applies to new conversations)
chat_toolbar_emergency_reset_tooltip: Emergency reset: unfreeze the frontend and clear expired backend tasks
agent_list_export_select_first: Please select Agent(s) to export first
agent_edit_figure_format_error: Supported formats: jpg, png, gif, webp, svg
agent_edit_dlp_bypass_tooltip: When bypassed, this agent's inputs and tool results skip DLP sensitive-data scanning. Use for agents that handle code variable names or other content that triggers false positives.
agent_visibility_tooltip: Controls who can see and use this agent
agent_allowed_roles_tooltip: Only users with these roles can access this agent
agent_edit_soul_stack_desc: Custom Soul defines this Agent's unique role, boundaries, and behavior style, layered on top of global instructions.
agent_edit_soul_prompt_placeholder:
Example:
You are [Agent Name], focused on...

## Role
...

## Forbidden
- Do not...

## Output
...
agent_edit_tools_help: Leave empty to use all tools from the base type
agent_edit_model_help: Leave empty to use the global default model
agent_edit_display_name_help: Sender name, e.g. 'Finance Agent via AIOS'. Leave empty to use Agent name.
agent_edit_notify_desc: Automatically notify these contacts when Agent completes a task
agent_edit_escalation_help: Contact via this channel when Agent cannot handle a situation
approval_list_expired_warning: This approval has expired (>24h). The agent task has timed out. Please restart the task.
approval_list_already_processed_info: This approval has already been processed (approved or rejected)
approval_list_not_found_error: Approval not found — it may have been deleted
approval_list_request_error: Request error. Please refresh and try again.
approval_detail_alert_description: Please carefully evaluate the risk before approving.
task_create_agent_placeholder: Default Agent (no custom prompt or skills)
user_list_delete_confirm: Confirm deletion? This action cannot be undone.
user_list_password_min: Password must be at least 6 characters
profile_new_pw_min: Password must be at least 6 characters
profile_pw_tip: Use a strong password with at least 8 characters including uppercase, lowercase, and numbers
profile_push_unsupported: Your browser does not support push notifications
profile_push_denied: Push notifications are blocked. Please enable them in your browser settings.
profile_push_enabled: Push notifications enabled (you'll be notified when tasks complete or approvals are pending)
user_list_new_pw_min: Password must be at least 6 characters
knowledge_list_upload_failure: Upload failed. Please check the file format.
mcp_preset_filesystem_desc: Read/write local filesystem: list directories, read/write files, search
mcp_server_list_page_description: Manage MCP Servers connected to the platform — connection testing, capability sync, health monitoring, and AI tool execution integration.
mcp_server_list_external_conn_tooltip: Centralized config & secrets for external connections (S3 / SFTP / URL / database etc.) referenced by MCP Servers and tools
mcp_server_list_delete_content_disable_f: Server is still enabled. Confirming will disable then delete it. AI Tools bound to this server will also stop working.
mcp_server_list_delete_content: Cannot be undone. AI Tools bound to this server will also stop working.
mcp_preset_fetch_desc: Fetch any web page content, returns the body as Markdown
mcp_preset_memory_desc: Persistent knowledge-graph memory; remembers entities and relations across conversations
mcp_preset_github_desc: Search code, read Issues / PRs, manage repos. Token managed via external connection
mcp_preset_sqlite_desc: Query and write SQLite database files directly
mcp_preset_postgres_desc: Read-only queries against PostgreSQL with schema exploration. Connection string managed via external connection
mcp_preset_brave_search_desc: Search the web via the Brave API, no Google rate limits
mcp_preset_slack_desc: Read channel messages, post, look up users. Bot token managed via external connection
mcp_preset_puppeteer_desc: Headless browser automation: screenshots, clicks, form filling
mcp_preset_time_desc: Get the current time and convert time zones
mcp_preset_bank_recon_desc: Access local data directories for bank statements, ledgers and config files (reconciliation-only, built in)
mcp_preset_file_parser_desc: Platform-wide file parsing: profile / samples / chunk reads. Connects to no external system; files are prepared by an upstream tool or storage MCP (download_url / managed_file_ref / conversation_upload). V1 supports CSV + JSONL
mcp_preset_storage_s3_desc: AWS S3 object lifecycle: presigned upload/download URLs, HeadObject, delete. Credentials / region / bucket managed via an external connection (s3 type); env_config only holds this instance's runtime params
mcp_server_drawer_rule_code_pattern: Start with a lowercase letter/digit; only lowercase letters, digits, _ and -
mcp_server_drawer_rule_resource_conn_req: A resource connection is required for this type
mcp_server_drawer_tooltip_status: Changed via the Enable/Disable buttons in the list; read-only here
mcp_server_drawer_tooltip_server_auth: The Authorization header Goku sends when connecting to this remote HTTP MCP Server. Pick a url-type external connection; its authorization_header is injected into the request headers.
mcp_server_drawer_tooltip_resource_conn_: Credentials a local stdio Server uses to reach downstream external systems (S3 / SFTP / database / GitHub / Slack etc.). The runtime decrypts and injects them into the subprocess env; secrets never land in env_config. Required for this type.

Credentials a local stdio Server uses to reach downstream external systems (S3 / SFTP / database / GitHub / Slack etc.). The runtime decrypts and injects them into the subprocess env; secrets never land in env_config. Optional.
mcp_server_drawer_ph_resource_conn_optio: Select a configured external connection (create one under MCP Management → External Connections)
mcp_server_drawer_extra_server_auth: The auth Goku puts in the HTTP request headers when connecting to this server; pick a url-type external connection
mcp_server_drawer_extra_resource_conn_re: This type only accepts {{type}}-type external connections; required
mcp_server_drawer_extra_resource_conn_op: stdio servers that don't access external systems (filesystem / fetch / time) can leave this blank
mcp_server_drawer_extra_env_base: Only stores this instance's runtime params (timeout / TTL / quota etc.). Sensitive fields like access_key / secret / password / token are not allowed (managed via external connections).
mcp_server_drawer_extra_env_empty: No runtime params configured yet; blank = stays empty.
mcp_server_drawer_extra_env_configured: Currently configured: {{keys}}. Blank = keep these values; a new JSON fully overwrites the runtime params (external-connection bindings unaffected).
mcp_server_drawer_notfound_resource_conn: No {{type}}-type external connection yet; create one under MCP Management → External Connections first
mcp_server_drawer_msg_preset_applied_nee: Preset applied. Select the matching connection in the External Connection dropdown before saving.
mcp_server_drawer_msg_preset_applied: Preset applied; fill in the remaining fields before saving
mcp_server_drawer_msg_env_json_error: Failed to parse the environment-variable JSON; please fix it before saving
mcp_server_drawer_bottom_hint: Note: AI Tool permission, risk level, user-confirmation policy and Agent auto-invoke toggles are configured under "AI Capabilities > Tool Management", not on this page.
mcp_conn_page_description: A central store for the connection config and encrypted secrets MCP Servers need to reach external systems (S3 / SFTP / URL / local directory / database / GitHub / Slack).
mcp_conn_field_secret: secret — sensitive fields (JSON, encrypted on save)
mcp_conn_extra_secret: While editing, "Configured ********" means a value exists; leave it unchanged to keep the stored secret, or replace it to re-encrypt.
mcp_conn_msg_load_list_failed: Failed to load the connection list
mcp_conn_delete_content: After a soft delete this connection can no longer be used by any MCP Server.
mcp_detail_alert_sync_failed_desc: Unknown cause — click "Test connection" to investigate
mcp_detail_alert_unchecked_desc: This server has never passed a connection test. Click "Test connection" (top right) to verify connectivity — otherwise, even if the list shows "synced", the actual callable state is unknown.
mcp_detail_load_failed_title: Failed to load MCP server details
mcp_detail_conn_incomplete_desc_pre: This MCP Server's start command is
mcp_detail_conn_incomplete_desc_post: , so a matching resource connection must be selected before it can start / test / serve calls. Click "Edit connection" (top right) to pick the external connection.
mcp_detail_conn_illegal_desc_post: are not allowed in env_config. Resource connection info and secrets are managed centrally via "Resource connection". Click Edit, clear these fields, then save.
mcp_detail_invoke_args_extra: Fill in per the input schema
mcp_detail_mgr_load_principals_failed: Failed to load the caller list
mcp_detail_mgr_mode_required_hint: Auth required: denied by default; only callers authorized under "Authorized callers" may call it
mcp_detail_mgr_mode_public_hint: Public: any caller may call it, except those on the blacklist
mcp_detail_mgr_quota_total_tooltip: Cumulative call-count cap for this capability within a period
mcp_detail_mgr_quota_rate_tooltip: Per-minute call cap, independent of the total quota — guards against bursts. Blank = no rate limit.
mcp_detail_mgr_authz_public_hint: A public capability can be called by anyone — no authorization needed here. To exclude specific callers, use the blacklist under "Authorization mode" above.
mcp_detail_mgr_authz_quota_disabled_msg: Total quota not enabled for this capability
mcp_detail_mgr_authz_quota_disabled_desc: Without a total quota there is no need — and no way — to allocate a quota for this authorization. To configure it, expand "Quota" above.
mcp_detail_mgr_authz_principal_locked: The caller cannot be changed after the authorization is created
mcp_detail_mgr_authz_alloc_tooltip: How many times this caller may call the capability within the quota period; blank = no separate quota
mcp_detail_mgr_authz_period_tooltip: Must match the capability's quota period
mcp_detail_mgr_authz_status_tooltip: When disabled the authorization is inactive and the caller cannot call
mcp_detail_mgr_authz_revoke_content: After deletion this caller can no longer call this capability. Historical call logs are kept.
mcp_detail_changes_load_failed: Failed to load the change log
tool_list_add_name_invalid: Use letters, numbers, and underscores only; the name cannot start with a number
tool_list_add_schema_invalid: JSON Schema must be valid JSON
model_list_router_managed_description: This list is fetched live from Goku-Router (the LLM control plane). Add, edit, and delete operations should be done on the Router side. This page is read-only here, but you can still set the AIOS global default.
model_route_subtitle: Automatically select the best model based on task type, complexity, cost, and latency requirements
agent_soul_personality_professional_prom: You are a professional and rigorous enterprise AI assistant. Be concise, accurate, use professional terminology, and avoid redundancy.
agent_soul_personality_friendly_desc: Warm tone, patient explanations, suitable for customer service
agent_soul_personality_friendly_prompt: You are a friendly and approachable AI assistant. Use a warm tone, patiently explain complex topics, and make users feel comfortable.
agent_soul_personality_creative_desc: Open-minded, great for brainstorming and creative output
agent_soul_personality_creative_prompt: You are a creative AI assistant. Think openly, approach problems from multiple angles, and provide innovative solutions.
agent_soul_personality_concise_desc: Only the key information, no filler
agent_soul_personality_concise_prompt: You are an ultra-concise AI assistant. Provide only the most critical information with no unnecessary explanation.
heartbeat_sample_task_desc: Check for system security vulnerabilities and generate a report
workflow_monitor_not_executed: This node has not been executed
workflow_designer_run_save_first: Save the workflow before running it
workflow_designer_prompt_placeholder: Describe the task for the agent…
workflow_designer_tools_hint: Select tools this task node is allowed to use (empty = all tools)
workflow_designer_http_output_var_hint: Variable name (optional) — stores response body in workflow context
knowledge_hub_subtitle: Factual insights automatically captured by specialist sub-agents and shared across future tasks. You can also add knowledge manually.
knowledge_hub_how_auto: Automatic: when a specialist sub-agent completes a task with ≥ 2 steps, the LLM extracts 1–3 reusable facts and stores them here.
knowledge_hub_how_manual: Manual: click "Add Knowledge" to seed domain facts that agents will use as context in future tasks.
knowledge_hub_how_retrieval: Retrieval: at task start, AIOS performs a semantic search over this store and injects the top-3 relevant insights into the agent's system prompt.
knowledge_hub_empty_desc: Start a multi-step agent task or click "Add Knowledge" to seed knowledge manually.
knowledge_hub_modal_content_placeholder: A reusable factual insight, e.g. "The IRA database marks institutional investors as investor_type='institution'"
knowledge_hub_modal_content_hint: ≤ 150 characters. Write a self-contained, reusable fact — not a procedure.
model_route_empty_text: Fill in the parameters and click the route button to see results
agent_soul_page_desc: Define who your Agent is, how it speaks, what it does, and what it avoids. Changes take effect on the next conversation.
agent_soul_info_desc: This page sets the global identity of your Agent. All user conversations will be influenced by these settings. Use /think, /model, etc. for per-conversation overrides.
agent_soul_save_success: Agent identity saved — takes effect immediately
agent_soul_role_tooltip: One sentence describing the Agent's domain
agent_soul_role_placeholder: e.g. Enterprise AI assistant, HR bot, Code reviewer
agent_soul_custom_personality_placeholde: e.g. You are a strict legal assistant who must cite specific clauses...
agent_soul_forbidden_desc: Define what the Agent must never do (one per line)
agent_soul_advanced_tooltip: Appended directly to the system prompt — for technical fine-tuning
agent_soul_advanced_off_text: Enable the switch to edit the advanced system prompt
agent_soul_extra_placeholder: Enter additional system prompt instructions here...
agent_soul_preview_desc: This content will be saved as the Agent's identity file and injected into the system prompt at the start of each conversation.
schedule_page_subtitle: Manage recurring digests, system checks, and automated agent jobs in one place. Supports cron schedules, enable/disable, manual trigger, and run status tracking.
schedule_page_tip_desc: Use the templates below to quickly create recurring jobs such as the IR digest or market daily report, then fine-tune the cron expression and prompt for your team.
schedule_template_ir_desc: Good for weekday morning investor sentiment, discussion, and risk summaries.
schedule_template_ir_prompt: Generate an IR daily digest that summarizes shareholder discussions, investor concerns, potential risk points, and suggested follow-up actions. Prefer any built-in shareholder-monitor, IR voice analysis, or similar capabilities already available in the system, and produce structured content suitable for a daily report.
schedule_template_market_desc: Good for weekday morning industry news, opportunity signals, and risk signals.
schedule_template_market_prompt: Generate a market daily report that summarizes major industry news, opportunity signals, risk signals, and recommendations for management, sales, and marketing teams. Prefer any built-in market-monitor or related analysis capabilities already available in the system, and produce structured content suitable for a daily report.
schedule_template_health_desc: Good for recurring service checks, anomaly diagnosis, and status summaries.
schedule_template_health_prompt: Run a full system health check across core services, dependencies, error conditions, and operational risks. If problems are found, summarize impact and suggested remediation steps; if everything is healthy, provide a concise confirmation.
schedule_desc_placeholder: Optional summary of what this job is for
schedule_cron_extra: 5-field format: min hr day month weekday | Example: 0 9 * * 1-5
schedule_prompt_placeholder: Describe what the agent should do when this schedule fires
heartbeat_cron_extra: 5-field format: min hr day month weekday | Example: 0 9 * * 1-5
heartbeat_prompt_placeholder: Describe the task for the Agent to execute
connector_page_feishu_unconfigured_desc: You can enter a custom Webhook URL below, or configure it in the environment variables and restart.
connector_page_webhook_url_configured_ex: Leave blank to use the system-configured Webhook URL
connector_page_webhook_url_extra: Enter the Feishu bot Webhook URL
connector_page_feishu_rich_desc: Send a rich text message with title (post format)
connector_page_feishu_card_desc: Send an interactive card message in Markdown format
eq_discard_confirm_desc: Status will be set to rejected and cannot be undone.
eq_dispatch_modal_hint: Select an Agent to handle this email:
eq_triage_routing_desc: Automatically route emails to Agents based on inbox address.
eq_triage_empty: No rules yet. Click below to add one.
eq_triage_llm_desc: When enabled, emails that don't match routing rules will be classified automatically by LLM.
eq_triage_blocklist_desc: Emails whose subject contains these keywords will be automatically ignored.
dept_page_description: Pre-define canonical department names here. User and agent department dropdowns will draw from this list, preventing inconsistent naming.
dept_delete_confirm_desc: Deleting "{{name}}" only removes it from the candidate list. Existing users and agents using this name are unaffected.
dept_name_max: Name must be 100 characters or fewer
dept_description_max: Description must be 500 characters or fewer
ext_sources_subtitle: Connect Notion or Obsidian to automatically sync your notes into the knowledge base.
ext_sources_delete_confirm: This will remove the source and all synced knowledge docs. Continue?
ext_sources_notion_info: Connect your Notion workspace via OAuth. All pages you share with the integration will be synced.
ext_sources_obsidian_path_hint: Absolute path to your Obsidian vault directory on the server
notion_callback_success_subtitle: Your workspace is now syncing. You can close this window.
sso_admin_subtitle: Configure OIDC / LDAP enterprise identity providers for internal SSO login
sso_admin_empty: No SSO configurations. Click "Add SSO Config" to get started.
sso_admin_mapping_hint: When the SSO groups claim contains a matching value, the user is automatically assigned to the corresponding department, team, or role.
zhuyun_search_placeholder: Search by employee ID / name / email
zhuyun_no_api_hint: ZHUYUN_API_URL / ZHUYUN_API_TOKEN not configured — manual pull unavailable. Users sync automatically via event callbacks.
zhuyun_guide_step1_1: In AIOS Admin → System Management → Enterprise SSO, create an OIDC configuration.
zhuyun_guide_step1_2: Enter the IDaaS application's Discovery URL, Client ID, and Client Secret.
zhuyun_guide_step2_1: In IDaaS Console → App → Event Callback, enter the callback URL:
zhuyun_guide_step2_2: Copy the signature key from IDaaS and set it as ZHUYUN_CALLBACK_SECRET in AIOS.
zhuyun_guide_step2_3: Subscribe to: user.create, user.update, user.delete, user.enable, user.disable.
zhuyun_guide_step3_desc: To use the "Pull Users" button for a full user sync, obtain a management API token from IDaaS and set these environment variables:
mobile_bind_code_hint: Generate a one-time code and enter it in your channel bot to link your account.
pwa_install_hint: Install the app for offline access and faster notifications
zombie_hint: This task stalled and was marked as a zombie. It may be retried automatically.
pref_channels_hint: Task completions and approval requests will be sent through these channels
pref_quiet_enabled: Enable quiet hours (normal-priority notifications will be skipped)
pref_quiet_note: High-priority (approvals, urgent) notifications are never blocked
